notes: Phase 5 (Sunwell Plateau) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Rogue Dps gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (drafted ahead of the TBC Anniversary realm reaching this content, same approach as p3/p4). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Relentless Earthstorm Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage) — or Swift Skyfire Diamond
Delicate Living Ruby (+8 Agi) once hit-capped — or Glinting Noble Topaz/Pyrestone (Agi/hit) before that
Rigid Dawnstone (+8 crit) — or Rigid Lionseye; ignore non-red/yellow socket bonuses
Shifting Nightseye (+5 dodge / +6 stamina) — or Shifting Shadowsong Amethyst, only enough to activate the meta
